summary: Frontend testing completed for CTCARGA offer creation wizard. All P0 features tested and working correctly: Step 1-4 validations, confirmation modals, multi-destination support, distribution validation, independent Fletes per destination, and full offer creation flow.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper component separation
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Validation logic is comprehensive and covers all required fields
Multi-destination feature with distribution validation works correctly
test_credentials: No authentication required for this feature
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features for offer creation wizard are working. Tested: Step 1 validation (Tipo de vía, Número principal, Número secundario, Letra/Bis/Complemento, Departamento, Municipio), Step 1 confirmation modal with Editar/Confirmar buttons, Step 2 validation with 'Destino X:' prefix for multiple destinations, Step 2 confirmation modal showing all destinations, Step 3 vehicle validation (Configuración, Tipo vehículo, Carrocería, Tipo carga), Step 4 Remitente section with auto-populated address from Step 1, Step 4 per-destination Destinatario sections with auto-populated addresses from Step 2, Step 4 multi-destination distribution validation (sum must equal Cantidad a movilizar), Step 4 independent Fletes per destination (all mandatory fields except Trayecto 1 and Trayecto 2), full offer creation flow with 2 destinations.

tests_executed.details: Clicking Siguiente without filling required fields shows validation errors for: Tipo de vía, Número principal, Número secundario, Letra/Bis/Complemento, Departamento, Municipio
After filling all required fields, confirmation modal appears showing address summary. Editar button closes modal and stays on Step 1, Confirmar proceeds to Step 2
Validation errors show with 'Destino X:' prefix for each destination
Modal shows all destination addresses (Destino 1, Destino 2)
Validation errors for: Configuración, Tipo de vehículo, Carrocería, Tipo de carga
Shows Remitente*, Nombre Responsable*, Identificación* fields and auto-populated Dirección from Step 1
Each destination shows Nombre Destinatario*, Identificación Destinatario*, and auto-populated Dirección Destinatario from Step 2
Distribution input per destination with validation that sum equals Cantidad a movilizar. Shows 'Distribuido: X / Y - Correcto' or error message
Each destination has its own Fletes section with all mandatory fields. Trayecto 1 and Trayecto 2 are optional
Validates all mandatory fields including distribution sum before submission

tests_executed.test: Full flow - Offer creation with 2 destinations
tests_executed.details: Successfully created offer with code 2026-04-00001-0001, redirected to /ofertas page showing the created offer
